characters.name: Alien (Pocket Universe)
characters.description: This Alien from thePocket Universeappeared in "Tunnel At The End Of The Light". It harassed the delegation and killedJames Severin,PrevorandCernun.

characters.description: The Alien appeared in "The Test" playing cards withDylan Hunt,Prieus, andTrance Gemini.

characters.name: Alien Queen
characters.description: Every 800 years, a particle cloud collides with the icy moon,Burrie, causing spectacular auroras which in turn is used to help her procreate and ensure the survival of her species.

characters.name: Beetle
characters.description: Beetle appeared in "A Heart for Falsehood Framed" as a sneaky thief, but also working forLeydon Bryce-Hawkins. He tried to extortTyr Anasazi, but failed miserably.

characters.name: Beetle
characters.description: Beetle appeared in "A Heart for Falsehood Framed" as a sneaky thief, but also working forLeydon Bryce-Hawkins. He tried to extortTyr Anasazi, but failed miserably.

characters.name: Cardsharp
characters.description: The Cardsharp appeared in "Attempting Screed". He tried to cheatFlecksat card in the Oasis Bar, butLunahcalled out that the cards were marked. Flecks pulled a gun on him and he promptly left theOasis Bar.

characters.name: Cavava
characters.description: Cavava at the spinning wheel, making armor Cavava, whenDylan Huntfirst met her, was a beautiful young woman imprisoned in a fairy-tale tower, spinning bio-armor. Extended acquaintance, however, proves this was just a disguise, with the creature's true form being rather more monstrous, and the bio-armor her 'children', an army designed to spread throughout the stars. When Dylan attempted to imprison Cavava and her 'offspring' in the cargo hold of theAndromeda, she attacked him, and he had the AI freeze the area (whilst he took refuge in aLancer Drop Pod), thus killing the creature, and severing the psychic link with the bio-armor, which was rendered useless.

characters.name: Cavava

characters.name: Dierdre
characters.description: Dierdreis an unseen alien girl whomSeamus Harperknew, and was flirting with on one of his supply runs to bring parts back to theAndromeda Ascendant.Beka Valentinewas teasing Harper about the fact that he could not even speak her language (Celtic, Beka thinks), and yet was apparently "in love" with her, when the PerseidRenvikentered theEureka Maru's outer airlock.Rommiecorrectly identifies Dierdre's dialect when a suddenly fluent Harper uses Irish Gaelic, an adapted form, to come on to her a little later, following it up with French and Perseid, and then several more languages. ("Harper 2.0")

characters.name: Dying Woman
characters.description: The Dying Woman appeared in "Dance of the Mayflies" as one of the casualties after being attacked by theThan-Thre-Kull.

characters.description: The Emissary appeared in "The Spider's Stratagem" asMoldar's secretary.

characters.name: Geryon
characters.description: Geryon was a bounty hunter of an unknown species. She was working out of Seefra-2 and usingIoneas a means of making money by making him pose as a sun god.

characters.name: Geryon
characters.description: Geryon was a bounty hunter of an unknown species. She was working out of Seefra-2 and usingIoneas a means of making money by making him pose as a sun god.

characters.name: HG-966HXCN5
characters.description: HG-966HXCN5, more commonly known asHG, was one of thousands of biosentient machines directed by theConsensus of Partsto make contact with the shipAndromeda Ascendant. It did so by chance, as it was a debris field of parts that was scattered along one of several thousand projected routes that theAndromedamight take. When theAndromedadrew close to it, it infiltrated the ship's docking bays and assembled itself in one ofAndromeda'sairlocks. It greetedDylan HuntandTyr Anasaziby asking to speak to their leader. HG was sent on a faux peace mission, because it thought that it had been sent to make first contact with theAndromedaregarding an alliance, but theConsensus of Partsactually wanted to askAndromedato join them and eject her organic crew. HG objected, but theConsensus of Partsordered him to disassemble himself. He did, but not before handing various parts of himself to theAndromedacrew. When he disassembled, his parts interconnected with Andromeda's systems, and could not be extracted without killing Andromeda; he had intended to remain hidden until VX had departed, but his parts became too widespread too quickly. The crew of the Andromeda negotiated with him and eventually reached a compromise, Dylan encouraging him to think of himself as more than a component after he had determined to remain alive. HG then drew all the "Outcast parts" together, and created a new entity known asOutcast Consensus One, which united aroundAndromedato enhance its power and draw out even some of VX's own outcast parts to assist them. With VX destroyed, HG then disconnected from Andromeda's systems to find more abandoned parts and to pursue his independence.

characters.name: Hsigo
characters.description: Hsigo was present in a bar onSvarog's Anvilwhen Dylan, Beka, Trance, & Tyr were looking forIsabella Ortiz. When theKalderan's were attacking the bar, he suggested that they just hand over Ortiz to them, but Trance steps in his way and threatens him if he even tries, so he backs down.

characters.name: Limnos
characters.description: Limnosis aBansheepilot on the Pursuit Squard from Taiklov Drift. While pursuing Beka and theEureka Maru, who escaped from the impound lot, the Maru dropped out of slipstream and left missiles and mines in her wake. Limnos andAnzenwere hit, and their ships were disabled. They survived, and were towed back to the drift. ("Destruction of Illusions")

characters.name: Maitre'd
characters.description: The Maitre'd appeared in "The Shards Of Rimni". He servedDylanandZeusin the Goulash Cafe onZempf Drift. Dylan spoke his alien language in order to trick Zeus and get the upper hand.

characters.name: Maitre'd

characters.name: Mata Hari
characters.description: Mata Hari (7 August 1876-15 October 1917), born Margaretha Gertruida Zelle, famous as both the most notorious female spy of the First World War and as a nude dancer during theBelle Epoqueperiod that lasted from 1871-1914. During her career, Mata Hari told many lies about herself and her ancestry, and others were spread after her death. She claimed that she had been born in India, and she was also said to be Javanese, Eurasian, or even Jewish. In Javanese (Indonesian), “Mata Hari” means “eye of the day”. “Mata Hari” is also one of the many names of Parvati, a Hindu goddess and consort of Shiva, the god of creation, destruction, and dance. In fact, Margaretha Zelle had no Asian blood at all. She was born in Leeuwarden the capital of the Dutch province of Friesland. Her father, Adam Zelle, was a prosperous hatter of German descent. Her mother, Antje Van Der Meulen, came from a well-off Frisian family. There was reportedly some Woudker blood in Mata Hari’s ancestry, the Woudkers being a gypsy-like local minority with dark complexions. Mata Hari’s early childhood was happy and she soon gave evidence of the strong personality and talent for self-dramatization that were to remain with her as an adult. In 1889, however, her father went bankrupt and the family split up. Margaretha’s mother died in 1891. The young Margaretha went to a teachers’ college in Leiden where she trained as a kindergarten teacher, but there were whispers that she had conducted an affair with the headmaster. In 1894, Margaretha was living with an uncle and was still without a job or a stable home life. She answered a personal ad that had been placed by Rudolph MacLeod, a Dutch Army officer of Scottish descent. The two married in 1895, after only a brief acquaintanceship. Soon after their marriage the couple sailed to Indonesia, where MacLeod’s unit was stationed. Mata Hari was not a classic beauty by the standards of her own day, lacking the fine features and pale complexion then favored by popular taste. The many photographs of her, however, show that she was indeed a strikingly handsome woman. Her dark eyes were particularly expressive, and in some images she looks very Asian. Mata Hari was a tall (5’ 9” or 5’ 10”), dark-haired woman with a classic hourglass figure: narrow waist, wide hips, and long, strong legs. She usually wore her hair up, though she sometimes let it down or braided it. On rare occasions, she may have bleached her hair blonde. Mata Hari seems to have been rather sensitive about her breasts. She usually kept her breasts covered with a “cache-sein” (a thinly padded bra), even while having sex and in performances where she was otherwise nude. She claimed that her ex-husband had bitten off her nipples in a fit of jealous rage, but this was untrue. The doctor who examined her body after her execution said that her breasts were ugly, but a former lover denied this strongly, insisting that Mata Hari had “quality breasts”. One official French Army document described h
characters.personality_section: Mata Hari was not a classic beauty by the standards of her own day, lacking the fine features and pale complexion then favored by popular taste. The many photographs of her, however, show that she was indeed a strikingly handsome woman. Her dark eyes were particularly expressive, and in some images she looks very Asian. Mata Hari was a tall (5’ 9” or 5’ 10”), dark-haired woman with a classic hourglass figure: narrow waist, wide hips, and long, strong legs. She usually wore her hair up, though she sometimes let it down or braided it. On rare occasions, she may have bleached her hair blonde. Mata Hari seems to have been rather sensitive about her breasts. She usually kept her breasts covered with a “cache-sein” (a thinly padded bra), even while having sex and in performances where she was otherwise nude. She claimed that her ex-husband had bitten off her nipples in a fit of jealous rage, but this was untrue. The doctor who examined her body after her execution said that her breasts were ugly, but a former lover denied this strongly, insisting that Mata Hari had “quality breasts”. One official French Army document described her breasts as “heavy”. Mata Hari danced bare-breasted more than once, and her topless performance as Salome in 1912 brought her great acclaim. Her breasts may not have been ideal according to some standards, but more probably she knew that concealing a small part of the body while exposing the rest had an exciting effect. characters.description: Misabo Ahm appeared in "Pieces of Eight" as the High Priestess of thePrescient.

characters.name: Prescient
characters.description: The Prescientis an non-humanoid alien being from an unknown homeworld though it described its origin as being from the "light". Its species believed in truth and had the ability to divine the past and future of other beings though were unable to tell their own fate. Furthermore, its kind believed heavily in truth and were placed in a bonded pair with a humanoid. In the case of the Prescient, it was bonded toMisabo Ahmwho acted in its behalf. At some unknown point in the past, the Prescient's homeworld was destroyed by what was believed to be theSpirit of the Abyssand theMagog. It along with Misabo survived where they drifted in space only to be captured byNietzscheans. During this time, the Prescient began telling the future of those that came to it and it eventually came into the possession ofCitizen Eightwith its fate being linked to him. Trapped in this state, both the Prescient and Misabo only desired freedom though the auger said that it would be the last thing Citizen Eight would see according to a reading. ("Pieces of Eight")

characters.name: Reaper
characters.description: Reaper A bounty hunter first encountered in "Fear and Loathing in the Milky Way". Initially, he was afterGerentex, a Nightsider, but Seamus Harper and Trance Gemini were drawn into the mix thanks to Gerentex taking them hostage.

characters.name: Reaper
characters.description: Reaper A bounty hunter first encountered in "Fear and Loathing in the Milky Way". Initially, he was afterGerentex, a Nightsider, but Seamus Harper and Trance Gemini were drawn into the mix thanks to Gerentex taking them hostage.

characters.name: Scourge
characters.description: Scourge TheScourgewas an agent of theAbyss, sent to theAndromeda Ascendantto retrieve the pieces of theEngine of Creation, so that the Abyss could remake the universe in its own image. He is from the Abyss'sPocket Universe, as he can pop in and out of existence and apparently ages backwards, as every time theAndromeda Ascendant Artificial Intelligencescans him, either in space or on the ship, his age fluctuates by thousands of years, getting younger all the while. He boards the Andromeda although several missile were fired at him, which confused the Andromeda until it became clear that he could tesseract and phase in and out of this universe. Through this ability he could avoid attacks. He also possessed the means to see into the future, and see future scenarios in much the same way thatTrance Geminican. Trance actually used her abilities to try and helpDylan Huntand the rest of the crew escape death. However, in several of her scenarios, they were not able to escape him and the entire crew died, and the Andromeda was destroyed. Finally, Captain Hunt found a way to defeat his abilities by bringing him into the slipcore, where, because of the nuances and improbabilities ofSlipstream, he could not predict what was going to happen. Hunt tossed him into slipstream, however he again reappeared on the ship before disappearing again. Trance explained that in traveling to a different place through slipstream he had never located them in the future so as to begin his attack backwards through time and so that timeline where he encountered them ceased to exist.

characters.name: Scourge
characters.description: Scourge TheScourgewas an agent of theAbyss, sent to theAndromeda Ascendantto retrieve the pieces of theEngine of Creation, so that the Abyss could remake the universe in its own image. characters.name: Spirit of the Abyss
characters.description: The Spirit of the Abyss, or simply known as the Abyss, is an enigmatic entity that is the leader and god of theMagog. It is also the most frequent nemesis of the NewSystems Commonwealth.

characters.name: Spirit of the Abyss
characters.description: The Spirit of the Abyss, or simply known as the Abyss, is an enigmatic entity that is the leader and god of theMagog. It is also the most frequent nemesis of the NewSystems Commonwealth.

characters.name: Tannoy
characters.description: Tannoy appeared in "A Heart for Falsehood Framed" as a voice over the PA system onPierpont Drift. "Green Bay Cargo One will be closed due to renovation. Please redirect your travellers to Red Bay Cargo Four."

characters.name: VX1583
characters.description: He gave an counteroffer that Andromeda and her crew join the Consensus. When both Dylan and Rommie decline his offer, he tries to speak to only Rommie, believing that she was either fearful of, corrupted by, or manipulated by Dylan but Rommie states that she acts of her own free will and is escorted off the ship. Later he tries to destroy Andromeda for illegally joining with HG and because he won't take no for an answer. He is then destroyed by HG and other discarded Consensus parts. ("The Sum of Its Parts")

characters.name: VX1583
characters.description: He gave an counteroffer that Andromeda and her crew join the Consensus. When both Dylan and Rommie decline his offer, he tries to speak to only Rommie, believing that she was either fearful of, corrupted by, or manipulated by Dylan but Rommie states that she acts of her own free will and is escorted off the ship. Later he tries to destroy Andromeda for illegally joining with HG and because he won't take no for an answer. He is then destroyed by HG and other discarded Consensus parts. ("The Sum of Its Parts")

characters.name: Xax
characters.description: Xaxwas a very large alien of an unknown species who was a prisoner on the prison planetHelios IX. He was one of the dominant prisoners, and was brutal to most of the other prisoners. He foughtDylan Huntas part of Dylan's initiation as a prisoner. Later on, he died trying to break in to the main prison facility to try and break out. He was killed by automated defense turrets, which shot him in the back. ("A Rose in the Ashes")
